title: galium commune subvar. glabrum
intro: Galium commune subvar. glabrum, also known as bare-stemmed bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing swelling, and fighting infections. The health benefits of Galium commune subvar. glabrum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antihistamine to alleviate allergic reactions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a variety of health issues.
